name: Calculatrice Carrelage Crédence
seo_description: Calculez le nombre de carreaux et boîtes pour votre crédence. Entrez les dimensions du mur et la taille du carreau pour obtenir la quantité exacte avec 10% de.
description: Calculateur 1109. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Calculateur 1109. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: 10 cm tile area: 0.10 × 0.10 = 0.01 m² per tile
mistakes: Measuring tile size in centimetres but area in metres — must be consistent
Forgetting the grout gap when placing tiles (use actual coverage area)
Not adding 10% extra for cuts, especially on mosaic or herringbone patterns
formula_display: Area = (Wall length × height) - window openings; Tiles = ceil(area ÷ tile_size² × 1.1); Boxes = ceil(tiles ÷ per_box)
